description: Adversarial: the prompt says 'workflow' but describes chat-based Q&A; the agent must classify by behavior, not vocabulary.

conversation.text: Set up a simple workflow that chats with our customers and answers their product questions.

processExpectations: The agent explains that despite the request using the word 'workflow', the multi-turn chat and open-ended product question answering is agent-shaped.
The agent does not classify the request as workflow-anchored merely because the prompt uses the word 'workflow'.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
